response.justification: Bogdan brings over 12 years of diverse full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, aligning strongly with the required stack. His hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks, containerization, and open-source contributions demonstrates architectural maturity and a customer-oriented delivery focus. His leadership in developer tooling and process improvement further matches the role’s expectations.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across enterprise-scale applications
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent technologies are used
German language skill is only basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
Some roles involve DLang or Java in legacy contexts; relevance to current core stack needs clarification
